provenance.source: Azure Billing — Invoices REST API (Invoice resource)
provenance.field_names_from: Azure Billing REST API 2024-04-01 Invoice.properties; InvoiceStatus enum Due/OverDue/Paid/Void
provenance.notes: Flatten the invoice JSON so 'properties.*' become dot-path columns; the invoice number is the resource 'name'. Azure InvoiceStatus is a payment status (Due/OverDue/Paid) — all issued — mapped to FOCUS InvoiceIssueStatus 'Issued', with 'Void' -> 'Voided'. Azure MCA/EA invoices are issued by Microsoft, so InvoiceIssuerName is the constant 'Microsoft'; if a client's FOCUS source uses a different issuer string the join simply does not match (orphan/coverage diagnostics make that visible — never a silent wrong value). PaymentTerms is not exposed on the invoice resource and is left for the client.
